title: centaurea × mirabilis
intro: Centaurea × mirabilis, also known as Cornflower or Bachelor's Button, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Centaurea × mirabilis include reducing inflammation, improving sleep, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Centaurea × mirabilis can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from digestive problems to skin conditions.
